reviews_list.review_title: A unique MBA college which enhances your skills.

review_content.Placements: Most of us got placed. Only those who opted out of placements were not included because DCSMAT teaches you to become entrepreneurs. Many have started businesses of their own. Placement companies include TCS, Reliance, AXIS Bank, Think and Learn Pvt. Ltd., ICICI, Berger paints, etc. Many of the students started their own startups in the incubation centres at Cochin, Bangalore, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Located in a hill station, DCSMAT is one of the best places to do your MBA. Cool climate varying from 12-19°c. Modern infrastructure, residential campus. Facilities stay with you making it a unique Gurukul atmosphere. One of the best libraries in Kerala for management institute. A collection of over 10000 books in management. Amphitheatre, canteen, and 24/7 coaching technique is unique. The classes might be scheduled at 7 in the morning. Sometimes at 5 in the evening.

reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: It’s one of the best college in Kerala. Its various culture activities and programs have made this college a versatile from any other college. Even though college is located at remote area, management has brought different activities and step to encourage students. I would recommend this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: College life was awesome at DCSMAT Trivandrum.

review_content.Placements: The placements were recorded less due to COVID. I got placed in Infosys with a package of 5 Lacs CTC. This college facilitates industrial visits to companies like Hindustan Lifecare Limited, Milma, Travancore Titanium, and so on. All students get internship training. Top recruiting companies are the likes of IBM.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is situated inside KINFRA Film and Video Park at Kazhakuttam. The atmosphere around the campus is awesome. Here, students get access to 23 hours of Wi-Fi internet. There is no canteen available in the college. However, a canteen is available outside the campus. The library and medical facilities are available.

college_info.college_name: CMJ University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Cutoff

highlights.summary: CMJ University admissions 2025 are open for various courses. Students can apply online by visiting the official website.

college_info.intro:
CMJ University popular programmes are BTech and BSc. BTech students are placed in top companies at top positions. BTech students can become Engineers, Software Developers, or can go for various other job profiles relevant to their field. The university follows outcome-based education (OBE) framework. The university follows a teaching-learning process.
BTech and BSc students can go for MTech and MSc programmes. Overall, it is one of the best universities offering quality education to students. Below mentioned are some of the CMJ University courses and their respective eligibility and CMJ University fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    No, candidates do not require appearing for JEE Main for admission at CMJ University. The university offers admission to BTech course based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Mathematics and Physics as compulsory subjects are offered admission in the BTech programme.
faqs.question: Does CMJ University accepts JEE score?

faqs.answer: A:    To join CMJ University, candidates need to follow the admission procedure mentioned on the university's website. CMJ University conducts its own entrance exam for various courses, and group discussions and personal interviews are taken for admitting students in MBA and M.Phil courses. Each course has its own eligibility conditions which are stated in the prospectus. Candidates with marks more than 80% in the 10+2/Graduation can apply for admissions directly. CMJ University is recognised by the University Grants Commission, and its degree is recognised for government jobs all over India
faqs.question: Can I join CMJ University directly?

faqs.answer: A:    The aspirants who are graduates from recognised universities in any stream can apply for MBA at CMJ University. Candidates must have the mark sheet and pass certificate with them. It has to be submitted at the time of form filling and admission for verification purposes. Hence, aspirants shall keep the original and copies handy with them.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria to get into MBA course of CMJ University?

faqs.answer: A:    CMJ University offers merit-based admission to its BPharm course. Hence, a cutoff list is not prepared by the university. However, a merit list can be published to declare names of the selected students. These candidates are called for counselling and document verification. The merit list is made as per the applicants performance in Class 12 or equivalent examination.
faqs.question: What is the cutoff for BPharm at CMJ University?

review_content.General: Around 80-90% of students were placed in our course. The highest salary package offered ranges between 6 LPA - 7 LPA. The lowest salary package offered ranges between 2 LPA - 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Google, Apple, Reliance, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Classrooms are spacious with a well-ventilated system and equipped with digital projectors for presentation. A huge library is available for students. The food served in the mess and canteen is good and affordable. They provide a variety of food items at affordable prices. Food delivery is also available.

admission_overview.college_name: CMJ University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

paragraphs: CMJ University admissionsare primarily merit-based. The university conducts its own entrance exam for the various courses.CMJ Universityoffers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in multiple streams such as Engineering, Pharmacy, Science, Management, etc. Interested candidates can apply online on the official website of the university.

The university offers admission to most of the courses based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants meeting the eligibility criteria can fill out the application form. Below areCMJ University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
CMJ University admissionsare held twice a year. Every year, the spring sessions start in January and the fall session in July. Below are the steps to get a seat in the university:
STEP 1: CMJ University Application Process 2025
Candidates can download the application form or collect the same from the campus. Aspirants need to fill out the details in the application form and pay an application fee to register for a course.
STEP 2: Selection

CMJ University conducts an entrance exam to select candidates for professional courses. Selected aspirants have to further appear for GDPI for MBA, MPhil, BTech and MTech courses. Besides, the selection for all other programmes is based on merit in the last qualifying exam.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

Once the selection rounds are over, the university releases a merit list to announce the names of the selected candidates. Such candidates are further called for counselling and document verification. Candidates need to pay theCMJ University feeto confirm their seat in the university.

The table below mentions all BSc specialisations and the eligibility criteria: BSc Specialisation Eligibility Criteria Medical Laboratory Technology* Candidates must clear Class 12 with Biology from a recognised board Radio Imaging Technology* Fashion Designing Candidates must clear Class 12 or its equivalent from a recognised board Textile Designing Interior Designing Beauty and Spa Management Jewellery Design/ Gemology Operation Theatre Technology** *Lateral entry to the third semester with Diploma in the relevant field **Lateral entry with DOTT and cleared Class 12 along with three-year experience in Operation Theatre

faqs.question: What is the CMJ University BSc mode of application?
faqs.answer: CMJ University accept BSc applications in both online and offline modes. Hence, the eligible students can either apply through the official website or can download the form and submit it to the admission office. To apply online, candidates can go to the official website. For offline form submission, the below steps can be followed:Step 1: Go through the prospectus and then select the preferred course.Step 2: Fill out the admission form.Step 3: Attach copies of all qualification certificates and

faqs.question: When does CMJ University registrations open for BSc?
faqs.answer: CMJ University carries out admission in spring and fall sessions. It is carried out inJan and Jul, respectively. CMJ University BSc aspirants must register and submit their applications on or before the prescribed deadline. The updates related to the admission procedure shall be available on the official website or can be confirmed with the admission office as well.

faqs.question: What is the CMJ University BSc admission process?
faqs.answer: CMJU Meghalaya admission cycle is carried out twice in a year. The BSc aspirants must register and submit their applications timely in online or offline mode. Following this, the applications are scanned based on performance in the last qualifying examination. A merit list may get released to declare names of the selected students. These candidates can then be called for counselling to allot seats. Once seats are allotted, the required fee payment can be done for the admission confirmation.

faqs.question: Which documents are required for CMJ University BSc admission?
faqs.answer: Candidates have to submit the educational certificates and identity proofs at the time of admission. These documents are required for verification purposes. Candidates must hold original and copies of the documents at the time ofCMJ University BSc admission. Mentioned below are a few documents to be kept handy:Class 10 and 12 marksheet and passing certificateCopy of bachelor's degree (if applicable)Community certificateMigration certificate (if applicable)Four stamp-size photographs

faqs.question: When are CMJ University application forms out?
faqs.answer: CMJ University applications are currently open. Candidates can download the application form from the university's website. The admissions are held twice in a year. The spring session commences in January and fall session in July. Aspirants have to fill out the application form in their own writing in English for the preferred course.

faqs.question: Can I join CMJ University directly?
faqs.answer: To join CMJ University, candidates need to follow the admission procedure mentioned on the university's website. CMJ University conducts its own entrance exam for various courses, and group discussions and personal interviews are taken for admitting students in MBA and M.Phil courses. Each course has its own eligibility conditions which are stated in the prospectus. Candidates with marks more than 80% in the 10+2/Graduation can apply for admissions directly. CMJ University is recognised by the University Grants Commission, and its degree is recognised for government jobs all over India

faqs.question: Does CMJ University accepts JEE score?
faqs.answer: No, candidates do not require appearing for JEE Main for admission at CMJ University. The university offers admission to BTech course based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Mathematics and Physics as compulsory subjects are offered admission in the BTech programme.

hostel.description:
The university has fully furnished and cozy hostels having total capacity of nearly 500 students. The calm serene tranquil atmosphere of hostel guided by discipline plays a key role in student's personality development because they find time to spend with him.
In a week three days will be non-veg meal. Students are not allowed to leave the hostel without written permission of the hostel warden or recommendation
of their guardian/local guardian. Hostel fee once paid will not be refundable. Seat will available as per 1st come 1st service.

library.description: The library of CMJ University has a lavish collection of books, periodicals, reports and reference material in its shelves and racks and maintaining through an Open Access System. A separate research center subscribes to major technical journals, magazines and newspapers., Photocopy, lamination and spiral binding facilities are available for students in a different section of the library. The University act as keen supplier of knowledge in this age of global access and creates an exposure and accessibility to students through its special facilities like e-journals and online journals.

reviews.review_heading: CMJ University is the best For MCA.
reviews.review_text: The university provides facilities like the library, big classrooms, and computer labs. The College library provides many books to the students. Hostel fees is 40000 per year and mess food is not bad. Sports tournaments are conducted every year and many students participate in the events.

reviews.review_heading: My college is CMJ university.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was not too good, its level was moderate, but the hostel and library were very good, all teachers were highly qualified, and all students have also supported by all teachers during the class, I think this was very good in old college, I think it's enough.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Classrooms are spacious with a well-ventilated system and equipped with digital projectors for presentation. A huge library is available for students. The food served in the mess and canteen is good and affordable. They provide a variety of food items at affordable prices. Food delivery is also available.

reviews.review_heading: You can join our university to get better placements and have a successful future.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms were huge. They had air conditioning and projectors. There was also a huge library with high-speed internet. The canteen and mess facilities were also good. They served a variety of food items at affordable prices.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied to be a student of this college.
reviews.review_text: There are 200 beds for boys and 100 beds for girls in our college hostel. I am a day scholar, so I do not know much about the hostel. However, I know somewhat that the food served in our hostel is quite good. The restrictions are strictly followed.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good institution for computer science.
reviews.review_text: It provides a hostel facility for the students. The food served in the hostel was hygienic and healthy. All things were well-organised in our hostel. Rules and regulations were strictly followed, which was a good sign.

review_content.Placements: 10% of students got placed. 25,000 per month is the average salary offered. Morarjee Textiles, Indorama Textiles, and Indigo Textiles are some companies that recruited from here. 20% of students received internships. Top roles offered in the course are quality control officer, weaver, designer, merchandiser, printer, dyer etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi on campus. Labs are average. Classrooms are average. The library has core books to study from, but issuing them is a real task. The teachers don't allow issuing books from the library often, which makes students ineligible to study material.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has no infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are not good. There is no Wi-Fi, outdated computers, no proper library, and canteen. A canteen is a place to sit and talk but it is very small.

reviews.review_heading: Santaji College is awesome.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very good. The college building is good, and it is going developing day by day. They provide all the facilities to the students. The library contains all the book materials. Classrooms are good, and labs are available for science students.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers here are excellent, but there are poor placements.
reviews.review_text: Compared to the infrastructure of other colleges, Santaji College has limited premises area. Our college provides good facilities for students, and the library facility is available not only to have course subjects but also for students who prepare for competitive exams. The hostel facility is not available to students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good teaching staff, good studies, but it does not provide good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides various facilities for students like free Wi-Fi, good classrooms and a computer lab. Our college does not provide hostel facility for students. In our college, there is a small canteen which provides good food at a cheap rate. Sports department conducts various activities like NCC camp, women cell camp and marathon.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for the near students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not satisfied, but the librarian is always helpful for the students in searching the books which are difficult to find. There is no hostel facility, but the canteen food is very tasty. Sports and games are the best.

reviews.review_heading: The best courses, good facilities, good faculty, good surroundings, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good, but there were not much facilities compared to other colleges. But, teachers were the best, friendly with each student, and supportive. Sports were not much developed. The medical facilities were best, have good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Santaji Mahavidyalaya, Nagpur.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are the worst. There is no proper light and table as it should be according to college. There are hundreds of forms students have to fill out, and no positive results are found. The canteen is good. There is no hostel available for students coming from different cities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college had not provided a hostel facility. Students were staying in flats or PGs. Our college has a library for reading. Our classrooms were not high-tech.

reviews.review_heading: Santaji College is the best in Nagpur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. In all 5 years which I have studied in that college, I have never experienced any inconveniences about infrastructure. All the facilities are provided on time. Canteen, medical, sports, Wi-Fi and labs are available.

reviews.review_heading: B.Sc course is the best in Satanji college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Santaji college is quite good, and our college building is posh. It has all the necessary facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a library. But there is no hostel, but the canteen is available only for fast food.

reviews.review_heading: Santaji College is good for all for graduation.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The library is in good condition, and the classrooms are also well-equipped. Wi-Fi connection is available for all, and labs are also available for all. The hostel is not available for anyone, and there is no medical checkup. Sports and games are available at some level.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for competitive exam students.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Canteen is also good. Our college doesn't have modern classrooms. They have a good library, and almost you can get everything you want here. Sports and games are also conducted here. Annual function is conducted in January, and many celebrations are also done in this college.

Infrastructure was good. It was a good place to live. They provided phones for calls to parents. Students were not allowed to use their own phones.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers were well-trained and qualified. They motivate us. 99% of students passed exams every year. They provided inter-college competition and intra-college competition also. Most of our students were well developed in any other knowledge. They were working and entrepreneurs. Teaching quality was good. Teachers were highly qualified. Our teachers were well-trained.

college_info.college_name: Parvathy's Arts and Science College: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Parvathyâ€™s Arts and Science College Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

placements.overview: Parvathy's Arts and Science College was founded in 2005. It is a private institute and is located in Dindigul, Tamil Nadu. Parvathy's Arts and Science College courses are offered to students at the UG, PG and Advanced Masters levels. The institute offers courses in Full Time mode. Parvathy's Arts and Science College offers a total of 31 courses in streams such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Design, Mass Communication & Media and Humanities & Social Sciences. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.Sc., M.Sc., BCA, B.Com and B.A. and the total seat intake for the available courses is 80. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Chemistry, Computer Science, Data Analytics, English and Fashion Design. Further, the average median salary is around INR 1,36,923. Apart from this, the Parvathy's Arts and Science College campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college is totally not worth joining, and does not have placements. Choose the college wisely.

review_content.Placements: None of them got placed in a good IT company. The college invites manufacturing companies to all departments, but we are from a technical background. The maximum salary package offered is 2 LPA only. Entirely manufacturing companies like Foxconn, etc., offer placements. No one got internships here. I don't think they offer any top roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is okay because they have only 3 blocks. I think that's not enough. It does not have any Wi-Fi facility. There are a lot of systems in the lab, but none of them work properly. Some systems may not work, and some systems don't have a keyboard or mouse. Only a few systems work properly. There are many students in one class, and how will students work in the lab and complete the coding tasks when the systems are not sufficient? The library is pretty good. I don't know much about the hostel. The canteen doesn't have much food and snack items, which is the worst.

At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and B.Com. Whereas, at PG level, Rajshree Institute of Management and Technology offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

overview_faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. A Computer Engineering graduate's average salary in India is approx. INR 6 lakh and higher. Also, owing to the exponential rise in AI & ML concept), CSE course gradutes have got a competitive job market and abundant opportunities for career growth.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It offers good faculty support and decent placements for the BBA students.

content.Placements: I am from the BBA course. In my college, around 65-75 percent of students got placed through campus recruitment (varies year to year). The highest package ranges from 6-8 LPA. The average package ranges from 2.5-3.5 LPA. The lowest package ranges from 1-3 LPA. Companies visit the college for placements. Roles offered are mostly entry-level, but they are helpful for starting a career.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is enabled with 24x7 Wi-Fi accessible in academic buildings, the library, and common areas. The speed is decent for academic tasks, online research, and project work. Labs are available depending on the course. Hostel rooms are clean and properly furnished. It has adequate lighting, fans, charging points, and basic amenities.

content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good, and Wi-Fi is available on the campus. Labs are very good, classrooms are very clean, and the library has a very good atmosphere. Facilities in the hostel are very good, including food and rooms. The canteen and medical facilities are also available.

admission_process.title: Rajshree Institute of Management and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Rajshree Institute of Management and Technology admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in streams includingEngineering, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design, Mass Communication and Media, Law, Humanities and Social Sciences, Science, Teaching and Education, Animation and Beauty and Fitness.Rajshree Institute of Management and Technologyadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asJEE Main, CUET, and CUET-PG. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 2,250 - 2,44,800for UG, PG and After 10th level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 2 years - 4 years.

faqs.question: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?
faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law.To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear theAll India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 427544 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 577465 in 2023 and 899193 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering demonstrated a declining trend.

Rajshree Institute of Management and Technology JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. reviews.review_heading: It offers good faculty support and decent placements for the BBA students.
reviews.review_text: The campus is enabled with 24x7 Wi-Fi accessible in academic buildings, the library, and common areas. The speed is decent for academic tasks, online research, and project work. Labs are available depending on the course. Hostel rooms are clean and properly furnished. It has adequate lighting, fans, charging points, and basic amenities.

reviews.review_heading: College is very beautiful, and the facilities are very good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good, and Wi-Fi is available on the campus. Labs are very good, classrooms are very clean, and the library has a very good atmosphere. Facilities in the hostel are very good, including food and rooms. The canteen and medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: It's a very good college. The facilities, faculty members, and all are very good and impressive.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, smart class, moot courts, laboratories, botanical garden, and many more are available. The food quality in the hostel is very good. Healthy and tasty food is preserved. Medical facilities are also available. Campus has its own hospital free for students. Many types of sports are available. Indoor and outdoor games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Rajshree Institute at a glance.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility is good as per hostel fee for a year is Rs 48,000 which includes 4 times meal at the specified time. You have 24/7 Wi-Fi facility available in hostel room as well as college campus with an average speed of around 300 kbps. The menu of the mess is created by student. The registration Process is done in registrar office. Gym facility is also available. Rented rooms, PG, and outside hostel are also available at a distance of 2 km from the college.

reviews.review_heading: My college is average in all facilities. They provide every facility and faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: The available facilities are average for a good student. Wi-Fi of our college is the worst. But the labs are good, and classrooms are good. Library is neat and clean and very silent. Hostel facilities are good. Mess and canteen are good for food. Other things like sports and games are amazing.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with my college, and I suggest others to get admission for your good career.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure base the college is very good. At my college, there are good seating arrangements and a mess for food and hostel availability. The classrooms are bigger in size and have been divided into sections for better study. The maximum number of seats per section is 40 only.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rajshree Institute of Management and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructures are very good and well maintained. Labs and classrooms are very good. The building of college is very large, classrooms are well maintained, and there is very tasty food in college canteen. Medical facilities are also very good and if you are a sportsperson, there is a lot of game to play on the field.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for students to prepare for other competitive exams.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a large campus which is approximately 36-40 acres because it is located in a village area. The library is in good condition. The hostel infrastructure is quite good but the mess food is horrible.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the college because of good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Civil engineering labs and top-class smart classrooms with Wi-Fi, and a big library that has thousands of books on various subjects of civil engineering books are available on campus. The canteen and medical facilities are very good. I don't know about the hostel food quality because I'm a day scholar.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of RIMT are poor. Labs are not proper as they should be, and the faculty in the college are bad. You can't even learn a small thing from the faculty members. The sports section is well-appreciated. Medical facilities are good, compared to other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a tier-3 college with less fees. Students who have financial problems can join.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by our college are average. Our college has a huge library which is a common library for all departments. Our college doesn't have a Wi-Fi facility for all, and labs are just average because teachers do not focus on practical. The equipment is also not available. I was a hosteller from last two years, but this time, I vacated due to the quality of the food served in the mess. It is very poor, but the hostel has a Wi-Fi facility, sports and games facilities. Those facilities a...

reviews.review_heading: The review of the college and students' life in it.
reviews.review_text: My college campus is of 24 acres. Different courses are available in my college. The most important thing is there is a playground on the campus. Rajshree Institute of Management and Technology is the very good college.

reviews.review_heading: In few words, I say that Rajshree Institute of Management and Technology is a good institute.
reviews.review_text: There are many faculty members, and they are divided into courses like MBA, B.Tech, M.Tech, etc. Internet labs and communication labs are good, but there is lack of books in the library of the college. The medical facility is provided to all the students and faculty by the institute.

reviews.review_heading: Don't waste your time and money.
reviews.review_text: Although from outside the campus looks big and beautiful but the inside story is totally different. Even for drinking, normal water is available in summer and you will get cold water in the winter season. No minerals water facilities are here. In libraries, books are available but they are not sufficient in numbers. The labs are not up to date. They are using old instruments and most of them do not work even.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty and good placement.
reviews.review_text:
The buildings are very good. The college has big classrooms with ACs and projectors to give the cool and enjoyable environment for studies. Conference room, seminar room gives the opportunity to show the students' talent in front of the delegates.
There are six labs for students.

review_content.Placements: Around 60% of students got internships during the course, and salary packages are high, 6 to 8 LPA offered. Recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, IBM, data analysis, local startups, and mid companies, etc. The average packages are 3 to 5%. .
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is quite good in the hostel as Wi-Fi connection is ahead. My department has good tables, and there are computers. review_content.Infrastructure: In hostels, we are provided with 1 bed, 1 cooler, 1 study table, 1 chair, curtains, and 1 mattress. The facilities of the hostels are pretty good here. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Decent academics, average placements, and good campus life.

content.Placements: Around 60% of students got internships during the course, and salary packages are high, 6 to 8 LPA offered. Recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, IBM, data analysis, local startups, and mid companies, etc. The average packages are 3 to 5%. .
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is quite good in the hostel as Wi-Fi connection is ahead. My department has good tables, and there are computers. The food is okay, very average food, but it's okay. Three times in a day we will get food. Meds are average. Sports and games are the same as above average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Has good infrastructure.

content.Placements: I don't know about other courses, but I do know about nursing placements. Students do get placements in foreign too, like Germany, the UK, Malaysia, and many more. Many international students also come here, and they are also provided with scholarship benefits.
content.Infrastructure: In hostels, we are provided with 1 bed, 1 cooler, 1 study table, 1 chair, curtains, and 1 mattress. The facilities of the hostels are pretty good here. The cafeteria is also good, properly maintained, and completely hygienic. We also have a library, and different courses have their own libraries here.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college for engineering, medicine, and education as well.

content.Placements: The best placement is here. More valuable companies come every year for placement, and the best lifestyle is here. Placements like Tata Motors, Maruti Suzuki, Flipkart, Amazon, HCL, Facebook, Apple, and other types of companies are also coming every year for placement. Good placement facilities.
content.Infrastructure: Super college faculty and hostel, wow. The course is not very difficult, and the teacher teaches in an easy language for the students. There are all types of courses in engineering, medicine, and education under the B.A., B.Sc., B.Com., and B.Ed. degrees available. And now a day, MBA courses are added.

admission_process.title: Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes admission 2025is a blend of entrance and merit-based. Entrance exam scores may be taken into consideration for certain courses/ cases. Students can pursue a variety of programmes in the fields of Engineering, Technology, Nursing, Agriculture, and more. These programmes are offered at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. Also known asABGI, the institute provides its programmes via its colleges, such as the College of Pharmacy, College of Nursing, College of Engineering, etc. The admission process of the institution is carried out in offline mode generally. Interested students can read the following article to know all about the admission process, courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and other information for Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes.

Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes, Pathankot admission criteriais a blend of merit and entrance depending on the course selected by the candidates. Students seeking to get into any of the offered courses are required to satisfy the eligibility requirements as specified by the concerned authority. The selection criteria may vary depending on the specialisation. The courses are offered in full-time mode. Aspirants can take a look at the following table to know about the general eligibility and selection criteria for some of the popularABGI Pathankot courses:

The admission procedure for Aman Bhalla Group of Institutes includes several steps from registration, selection, and counselling (if applicable), and ends with admission confirmation. Aspirants need to ensure that they satisfy the criteria set by the college before applying online. Interested students can follow the steps listed below to complete theABGI admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

Interested students can visit the official website of the institute to fill out the Admission Enquiry Form. Someone from the institute will reach out to the prospective candidate to help carry out the remaining process.
Step 2: Selection Process

The selection procedure may vary depending on the programme and specialisations. Students are shortlisted based on merit in the last qualifying exam. However, the institute may accept scores obtained in the relevant entrance exams. Additionally, students may have to participate in counselling for seat allotment.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
For final admission, selected students need to pay theABGI admission fees.

individual_reviews.title: Faculty of this college and the overall environment of the college are very positive.

content.Placements: 50% of students got placed. The average package offered by the college. HDB Finance is the only company in my course that is a top recruiting company. 40% of students only got an internship. Colleges have to focus on attracting top companies for placement. No course is offered by college.
content.Infrastructure: There are good library and classrooms, but no Wi-Fi in the classrooms. Quality facilities are provided by the college, there's good drinkable water, and basic toilets are also clean. In short, all basic facilities are provided by the college. Medical facilities, sports, and games are there.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Microprocessor and Microcontrollers - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Best college I studied In.

content.Placements: Minimum 2000 candidates are chosen with reputed companies out of 2600 students from the campus. A minimum of 3,00,000 -500,000 package is provided. The maximum package ranges up to 25,00,000 Rupees. I was chosen in a very well reputed company and they offered me a starting package of Rs 5,00,000 and my seniors are getting a package of Rs 7,00,000.
content.Infrastructure: The college has an area of about 50 acres widespread providing beautiful views and facilities. It has hostel facilities at a cheap rate alongside built-in Wi-Fi facilities. It has a Gym, playground for various games, computer rooms with A.C, etc. overall the college is a great package to study in.

highlights.summary: The KMAT Kerala 2026 first session exam result has been announced for K.M.M. College of Arts and Science admission to the MBA course. Candidates can download their scorecard by logging in to the official website.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: My class and computer labs are fully Wi-Fi supported, and the college looks nice and beautiful.

review_content.Placements: In my college, placements are just good, not overhyped, but they're just okay. Several companies are recruiting from my college through placements. Companies come from both Kerala and outside Kerala. A larger number of students who are interested in coding and technical subjects easily get placed, and the college provides the needed support.
review_content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure is really good and awesome, just looking like a wow. My class and all computer labs are fully Wi-Fi supported, and the college looks nice and beautiful. My college provides a good and eco-friendly hostel and good canteen facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: My college provides scholarships based on caste.

review_content.Placements: Our college placement rate is 92 percent. The maximum salary is 18 LPA, the average salary is 12 LPA and the minimum wage was 5.5 LPA. Companies like Well Fargo, Deloitte, KPMG, Infosys, TCS, Rinex, and Axis Bank attend our college and offer excellent salary structures for positions like Finance Manager, HR, Digital Marketer, Accounts, Marketing, Sales and Business Analyst for the company.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is very good. We have all the necessary facilities, like Wi-Fi, a library, classrooms and labs. The classrooms are equipped with teaching materials, and the hotel office is located in our college. The food at the hotel is healthy and medical facilities are available. Our college has many teams in sports and sporting events are organized where we can compete with other colleges.

review_summary.college_name: K.M.M. College of Arts and Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It has really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Very few students that I know have been placed. The highest package was 5 LPA, the lowest was 3 LPA, and the average was 4 LPA. IT companies like Inforpark offer jobs, and a very few got direct jobs in IT companies, at Bangalore. Software developed, and application developed roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and labs were highly developed with every new technology provided. Classrooms were very attractive, which made students focus more. High-quality foods are provided with great extra activities. The timing was also great and very strict so that students could focus more on studies.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College has high placements and college provides add on courses like AI.

content.Placements: 70 percent of students got placed in our college and started to earn in their younger age. They have the ability to do their jobs and are courageous.
content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities in our college for studying and for other extracurricular activities. We have technical programs, and they are all at their extreme level. Hostels provide security and time limits. All students behave well and have changed their habits nicely.
content.Faculty: Our college conducts internal exams for our semester exams. Teachers are very friendly, and they teach not only the syllabus but also improve the behaviour and personality of students. Our teaching staff and non-teaching staff teach well, and because of this we wrote our exams well. Our college conducts internal exams before semester exams very strictly.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My class and computer labs are fully Wi-Fi supported, and the college looks nice and beautiful.

content.Placements: In my college, placements are just good, not overhyped, but they're just okay. Several companies are recruiting from my college through placements. Companies come from both Kerala and outside Kerala. A larger number of students who are interested in coding and technical subjects easily get placed, and the college provides the needed support.
content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure is really good and awesome, just looking like a wow. My class and all computer labs are fully Wi-Fi supported, and the college looks nice and beautiful. My college provides a good and eco-friendly hostel and good canteen facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: My college provides scholarships based on caste.

content.Placements: Our college placement rate is 92 percent. The maximum salary is 18 LPA, the average salary is 12 LPA and the minimum wage was 5.5 LPA. Companies like Well Fargo, Deloitte, KPMG, Infosys, TCS, Rinex, and Axis Bank attend our college and offer excellent salary structures for positions like Finance Manager, HR, Digital Marketer, Accounts, Marketing, Sales and Business Analyst for the company.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is very good. We have all the necessary facilities, like Wi-Fi, a library, classrooms and labs. The classrooms are equipped with teaching materials, and the hotel office is located in our college. The food at the hotel is healthy and medical facilities are available. Our college has many teams in sports and sporting events are organized where we can compete with other colleges.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Apparel and Fashion Design - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of K.M.M. College of Arts and Science.

content.Placements: I actually studied B.Sc. psychology here. We had so many awareness classes and workshops related to psychology. Placement in this course is not practically possible. We can have so many good internship opportunities. Psychology is an emerging field in India, so career opportunities are growing quickly.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. The library has so many books that we can refer to. The psychology lab is efficient. The food available in the canteen is of good quality. We have a field for indoor football matches. The libraries will undoubtedly assist you. The computer lab is also in good condition.

We have a field for indoor football matches. The libraries will undoubtedly assist you. The computer lab is also in good condition.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides average facilities, average placements, and good teaching.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are pretty good. Wi-Fi is pretty fast. We have 3 to 6 labs. Classrooms are big and spacious. You can't expect sports and games. The hostels are not good. Most of my classmates stay in private hostels. The ambiance in the college hostel is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and curriculum. Everything is bad apart from them.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are neat and fresh. They have good environment for studies. There are great computer labs too with all the necessities. The library too is very useful and up to date. The college doesn't have its own hostel, which is a great fallback, as many students have to look for private hostels and accommodation.

reviews.review_heading: The best thing is the friends and the worst thing is that there is no place to enjoy with friends.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is not good, it is like a hospital with a lot of rooms and no outside ground. The canteen is the best thing in this college. The snacks and the food is very delicious and fresh and workers are very kind hearted.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college with well-trained teachers.
reviews.review_text: The new block is very good. The new block provides high-speed internet. It has well-maintained classrooms. There is a large football ground near the college. The canteen provides good quality food. The college has a lift facility. There are 2 labs in our college that are computer lab and chemistry lab.

reviews.review_heading: Review of K.M.M. College of Arts and Science.
reviews.review_text: This college has computer IT labs that have all software and a huge number of PCs. Two CCTV cameras are installed in our classroom. Any student can become a member of the library in our college. Our college has a canteen with affordable prices. There is a variety of sports such as football, cricket and others. Moreover, there is a good hostel. Our college has a tiny library, but it publishes six newspapers each day, among which one in English and another one in Malayalam. Classrooms are similar ...

reviews.review_heading: It has decent faculty, nice placements and great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college has a decently built infrastructure with great lab facilities. The labs do have a good internet connection with Wi-Fi support. The classrooms are spacious, and the libraries have a lot of books available, both academic and non-academic varieties. The college hostel is clean, and the college canteen provides good food at a decent amount. Basic medical facilities are available. Sports events, which include football, cricket, basketball, and athletics are conducted every year.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for all type of students. Easily affordable. Students can enjoy the college life.
reviews.review_text: This college provides computer IT labs with all software installed and many computers. Our classroom contains two cctv camera. Our college has a library in which any one can take membership. Our college has a canteen which has low prices and has selection for all sports like football, cricket, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of my college life and the new era.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a free Wi-Fi service and smart classrooms. More than 10,000 books are available in our library. The canteen serves many items and students use the canteen to have lunch. The hostel is very clean and has a vast. Each day, a different type and quality of food is served. It charges a budget-friendly rent.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to enjoy your college days, you have to be a hosteller.
reviews.review_text: The college doesn't have its own hostel, but the college owns some buildings, and there are private hostels in the area. You can first join any hostel you want; after a few days, you can move to any hostel you like in no time. Some awesome seniors can help you.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied of faculty members and good infrastructure in the college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructures are good. Need more improvements in sports. Mostly promoting only in cricket and football. Library, canteen and labs all are very good and NEET. And medical room also provided in college. Lift facility also available. And also drinking water available in every floor. Now ending machines also started.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Venkateshwara University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Fully satisfied and happy here.

content.Placements: Nearly about 97% of students got passed. I think 87% was the highest there in my batch. But they offered good internship opportunities. Mostly everyone joined them too and gave me the opportunity to join other big industry tycoons and had a meet up with them.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was pretty good with a huge campus. Classes were also good to be sit there even for the whole day. They provided us with mostly every equipment needed for the practical. Most loved thing was the neat and clean environment all over there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with faculty members. Infrastructure is good.

content.Placements: All 250 students got placed from course. The highest is no limit but the lowest is 13 LPA. Students themselves get their further education by NEET PG. 100% of students of MBBS got internships. We are provided with a family adoption program which surely enhances our communication skills.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are equipped with AC and lecture hall with projector and electronic podium. Ground is available with multiple playable games like cricket, football, etc. Canteen is available with 24/7 supply of milk and eatables. Hostel facility is available with AC rooms, laundry, and sweeper facilities. Rooms are better than any college in NCR.

faqs.question: How can candidates join SVU - Shri Venkateshwara University?
faqs.answer: Marks are determined using the combined IPE+AP EAMCET results. To acquire the rank under 5000 needed to get a free seat at SV UNIVERSITY, you need to score higher than 105+. Eamcet qualifying marks are 60, and there is no minimum score requirement for candidates who have reservations. Candidates must take the SVUCET entrance exam, which is offered by Sri Venkateswara University, to be considered for admission to all PG programs with the exception of the M.B.A. and M.C.A. programs.

hostel_campus.college_name: Shri Venkateshwara University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: University has a separate hostel for both boys and girls. The rooms are available in single, double,three and four occupancy basis. 24*7 power and water supply is available. Security guards are available round the clock.Hot water is supplied during the winter. Water coolers are attached with R.O. installed on each floor.

library.description: The Shri Venkateshwara University has well stocked, air-conditioned and fully computerised multi-media libraries for its faculty. To ignite the intellectual spirit in young minds, a stock of 50,000 latest books, large collection of video/audio CDs, Magazines, Journals, industry and company information sources are made available to the students, faculty and staff. The university also has faculty-wise libraries to provide adequate support for complete academic pursuit. Additionally, separate reference section for each faculty recommended books for each course has also been provided.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied and happy here.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was pretty good with a huge campus. Classes were also good to be sit there even for the whole day. They provided us with mostly every equipment needed for the practical. Most loved thing was the neat and clean environment all over there.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with faculty members. Infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are equipped with AC and lecture hall with projector and electronic podium. Ground is available with multiple playable games like cricket, football, etc. Canteen is available with 24/7 supply of milk and eatables. Hostel facility is available with AC rooms, laundry, and sweeper facilities. Rooms are better than any college in NCR.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for top and average students.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides the best facilities like classrooms and a well-maintained library. The hostel facility, a canteen, medical facilities, and sports are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placements really good infrastructure and facilities .
reviews.review_text: It has a good infrastructure and they provide us free Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library and gym. Faculty is good, calm, polite we can ask any doubts related to topics without any fear or hesitation. They are very cooperative .

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with teachers and good placements for 2015, and the packages are good.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the hostels were nearby. Attach various infrastructure facilities as common television, telephone, tables, and chairs sector. They were modern gym, and sports equipment was provided. it also provides an auditorium, and medical centers were available.

reviews.review_heading: College is still under construction, not good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, workshops, library, gym, great classrooms, nice faculty, canteen was good and food there is great, there's a medical institution inside, games like basketball football indoors game like table tennis etc. and no AC's in classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for medical sciences.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is nice as the university is only 8 years old. It is trying to expand. It is situated near NH 24, near Moradabad in a lush green environment. The area is very nice, and it is located far away from the city, in Holy Ganges Plateau. So, lots and lots of greenery is present.

reviews.review_heading: It is a hub of education and opportunities. Come, learn and get rewarded talent.
reviews.review_text: The university is built on a huge area. The infrastructure of the university is good. There are well-equipped classrooms and computer laboratory. There is a mini library to exploit the knowledge. The quality of food is only a bit of concern. Apart from that, hostel, sports and facilities are up to mark. Events, fests and campus crowd are poor. It needs to be highlighted in terms of reputation.

A very good university campus with experienced faculty and good options for placements. Also good for enjoying your life along with studies. Very comfortable college timings and lots more. Good library facility, along with sports and gym facility. The hospital also available for free of cost. A very good university campus with experienced faculty and good options for placements. Also good for enjoying your life along with studies. Very comfortable college timings and lots more. Good library facility, along with sports and gym facility. The hospital also available for free of cost.

reviews.review_heading: Great placement and good facilities, but it is a mixed bag with faculty disappointments.
reviews.review_text: Shri Venkateshwara University has many courses like MBBS, B.Pharma, Diploma, B.Ed, etc. The hostels are very beautiful with separate rooms for two people per room, and boys and girls are not mixed in the rooms. The mess food is really good, and the canteen is unique. Many games are played daily.

reviews.review_heading: Short view of shri Venketeshwar university .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and development is good which is more attractive and development of the class. As the class walls are well cleaned and maintained with different types of attractive paints. As the furniture is good and the single student can sit by on one chair as they made separate furniture.

reviews.review_heading: Iiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiii.
reviews.review_text: I think the placement of my college is about 1 percent. And I think package offered in my college is about 1 to 1.5 lac. No top companies hire in it and the hire companies are local. Is to get a degree. Don't take admission in this for regular base classes.

reviews.review_heading: An Average College for Average Students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is still developing. Faculty members are below average. The college is not as per the expectations of studious students. One should try other colleges in Noida. The atmosphere is not up to the mark, the crowd consists of village people.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Thakur Polytechnic offers diverse programmes at UG level in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, IT & Software and Design. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as UG Diploma. Thakur Polytechnic fee structure for all the courses is around INR 18,000 to 1,46,000.

The highest package offered was 6 LPA and the lowest was around 1.5 LPA. 100 per cent of students get internships related to their respective departments. review_summary.college_name: Thakur Polytechnic Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, Okayish faculty.

content.Placements: There were around 180-200 students. Getting placements after a Diploma is tough, so not many companies. All the students got internships for 3 months. Computer engineer, learnt a lot in the process, and also got a letter of recommendation from the company.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is top-notch, with a great library and AC classrooms. Canteen and cafeteria food is mid, but lots of events, so it's a very happening college overall. The crowd can be a bit wee, but good people. Very active in the case of sports (don't miss Aventura). Also had many other events.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college is really good.

content.Placements: Out of 200 students, only two were placed. The highest package offered is INR 2.4 lakh per annum. Only one company came during my batch, which is L&T Infotech. Well, for internships, there were several companies offering non-paid internships, and all the students have applied because it's mandatory for the diploma courses. During my batch, there was only one company that came for the placement because of COVID.
content.Infrastructure: The college has an advanced practical lab for all the courses like civil engineering and computer science, and in a day we have a 3-hour practical, and the infrastructure is really excellent. And we don't have the mess; we have the canteen, which provides average food, and we have places for sports and medical facilities too for medical emergencies.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineeering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: This college is absolutely good, you have a fun ride here.

content.Placements: There were about 70 percent of students placed. The highest package offered was 6 LPA and the lowest was around 1.5 LPA. 100 per cent of students get internships related to their respective departments. The college promotes and helps startups as well to do better in our lives.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was not that much active in the corridor area whereas, in the respective labs, they were superb. Apart from this, we had a great library with daily newspaper facilities like the Times of Mumbai and Mirror etc. The canteen food is not up to the mark sometimes.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the infrastructure and faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements are good in our college. Top recruiting companies are L&T, Tata Projects, and H.K. Infra.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides facilities like various laboratories, a library, and classrooms with smart boards. The infrastructure plays a very important role in the development of the college.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very friendly. They are always ready to clear students' doubts. They are great teachers. They explain everything in detail.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: I've completed my college in computer branch where I have worked with great minded people. The greatest thing is instead of education it provides healthy relationship among people where you learn and grows professionally. It provides placement with around 3 to 4 LPA packages. A few classmates are working in some good companies like TCS, L & T, Infosys, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: It provides high-level infrastructure and free Wi-Fi. During lectures, mobile phones are strictly banned for all students. There is a college hostel if you want to stay in rent near the college, you can by your responsibility college wont take any responsibility after college timing. There is a first-class canteen and indoor and outdoor games on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college with great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has an excellent infrastructure. We have a Wi-Fi facility, but it is only available for professors and other staff. Students can only use 35 MB of data, so it's limited. The labs are perfectly fine, and the best infrastructure you will find in our college is the library! It's amazing.

reviews.review_heading: Students who want to learn with enjoying their college life can take admission to this college.
reviews.review_text: The best thing I like about our is its infrastructure and crowd. Wi-Fi service is available for students as well as staff members. Classrooms are cleaned and well maintained. The college has got an award for the best library. Almost there are all sorts of books available to read.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Thakur Polytechnic.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available within college premises and the speed of Wi-Fi is also fine. Labs, classrooms, and a library are regularly cleaned and maintained. The quality of food at the college is also fine. They prepare different food on different days and special food on special occasions.

reviews.review_heading: There is a great infrastructure here.
reviews.review_text: McDonald's is attached to our college, and the cafeteria is very good. Even the food served in the canteen is good, and the library is extremely lavish. The campus is also very good. There are even indoor games such as gym, carrom, pool, snooker and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Thakur Polytechnic is the best.
reviews.review_text: Our college has amazing faculty members and undoubtedly one of the best infrastructures. The canteen is amazing, and good food was available to the students. There was no hostel, but classrooms and the overall interior of the college make it very beautiful.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Thakur Polytechnic.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is at par. The campus is mostly used for shooting purposes by various web series, daily soaps and movies, and that catches some limelight. There is a self canteen and a tiny small cafe inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: It's a very good college.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is really good. Wi-Fi is available all over the college. All the labs have every essential machinery. The quality of canteen food is average. 
Medical facilities are available. Sports and games facilities are available. Other events are also held in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best diploma college in every aspect.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is one of the best parts of our college due to which students never bunk the college. The infrastructure of our college is very mesmerizing and fascinating that many of the bollywood movies are shot in our college. Many TV channels like Star Plus, Zee TV, and Sony have contracts with our college for shooting. Our college also has aviation, due to which the college has built a demo airplane to give us an experience, which is the best part of college.

reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best. It has a dedicated playroom where you can play games like carrom table tennis etc. The quality of the food in the canteen is very good. McDonald's is available around the corner. All the classrooms are air-conditioned and have sufficient lights. The library is fully furnished. It has a separate reading room and e-library.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good to gain knowledge and have personality development.
reviews.review_text: Our college is very good to study, and the environment of the college is also good for students. There is a good Wi-Fi facility in our college with good speed. There are libraries and labs for all different departments. There are a canteen and cafe in our college which provide good food services. There is a clinic in our college for an emergency. Many sports are played in our college.
